hooks.command: for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx) npx eslint --fix --quiet "$f" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac; done

CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,os,sys; data=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','') or sys.stdin.read(); print(json.loads(data).get('command','') if data else '')" 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *'git commit'*) WEB_CHANGES=$(git diff HEAD~1 --name-only -- apps/web/ 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$WEB_CHANGES" ]; then echo 'This commit touched apps/web/. If this is a new feature or significant change, consider running /mobile-parity to check for mobile parity tickets.'; fi;; esac; exit 0
for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do case "$f" in */pnpm-lock.yaml|*/.env.local|*/.env|*/types.gen.ts) echo "BLOCK: Protected file: $f" && exit 2;; esac; done

for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do case "$f" in */supabase/migrations/*.sql) git -C /Users/beanie/source/trainers.gg ls-files --error-unmatch "$f" 2>/dev/null && echo "BLOCK: Cannot edit committed migration $f — create a new migration instead" && exit 2;; esac; done

for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do case "$f" in */apps/web/middleware.ts) echo "BLOCK: Next.js 16 uses proxy.ts for request interception. Creating middleware.ts will break all routes (404 on every page)." && exit 2;; esac; done

SKILLS=''; for f in $(echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | tr ',' ' '); do case "$f" in */apps/web/*) SKILLS="$SKILLS building-web-app";; */apps/mobile/*) SKILLS="$SKILLS building-mobile-app";; */packages/supabase/supabase/functions/*) SKILLS="$SKILLS edge-function";; */packages/supabase/supabase/migrations/*) SKILLS="$SKILLS create-migration";; */packages/validators/*) SKILLS="$SKILLS validating-input";; */packages/tournaments/*) SKILLS="$SKILLS tournament-logic";; */packages/pokemon/*) SKILLS="$SKILLS pokemon-parsing";; */packages/theme/*) SKILLS="$SKILLS creating-components";; */packages/posthog/*) SKILLS="$SKILLS posthog-analytics";; */packages/atproto/*) SKILLS="$SKILLS atproto-bluesky";; */packages/utils/*) SKILLS="$SKILLS shared-utils";; */infra/*) SKILLS="$SKILLS infrastructure";; */__tests__/*|*.test.ts|*.test.tsx) SKILLS="$SKILLS writing-tests";; esac; done; SKILLS=$(echo $SKILLS | tr ' ' '\n' | sort -u | tr '\n' ' ' | sed 's/ $//'); if [ -n "$SKILLS" ]; then echo "Suggested skills for this file: $SKILLS"; fi; exit 0

REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ -n "$REPO_ROOT" ]; then cd "$REPO_ROOT" || exit 0; BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && [ "$BRANCH" != 'main' ] && [ "$BRANCH" != 'master' ]; then if git rev-parse --verify main >/dev/null 2>&1; then BASE_BRANCH=main; elif git rev-parse --verify master >/dev/null 2>&1; then BASE_BRANCH=master; else BASE_BRANCH=; fi; if [ -n "$BASE_BRANCH" ]; then WEB_CHANGES=$(git diff --name-only "$BASE_BRANCH"...HEAD -- apps/web/ 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$WEB_CHANGES" ]; then echo 'This branch has apps/web/ changes. If you have added new features, run /mobile-parity to check for mobile parity tickets.'; fi; fi; fi; fi; exit 0
